title: Agent-FAQ
description: Python-based multi-agent enterprise knowledge assistant automating customer query resolution and workflow orchestration using LangGraph and OpenAI APIs. Designed a 5-agent architecture handling retrieval, verification, summarization, and autonomous task execution. Implemented RAG with PostgreSQL pgvector and Redis caching, reducing response latency by 85% and support resolution time from 10–15 minutes to under 2 seconds.

title: Fairness Firewall
description: Enterprise AI bias auditing platform built using LLM APIs and prompt engineering to detect systemic bias in tabular datasets. Implemented schema-agnostic fairness pipelines, Statistical Parity Difference analysis, Four-Fifths Rule enforcement, and AI-powered executive audit reporting with RAG-enabled mitigation workflows.

title: KNRFarm
description: Cloud-native Android livestock management platform managing herd lifecycle, inventory, expenses, and medical records. Implemented real-time Firestore synchronization, RBAC security, predictive pregnancy and vaccination scheduling workflows, and KPI dashboards reducing missed medical events by 95%.

title: Bluestock Financial Analytics Engine
description: Real-time financial analytics platform processing reports for 100+ Nifty 100 companies. Built automated investment insight generation including CAGR, ROE, valuation metrics, optimized MySQL schemas with UPSERT logic, and high-frequency financial data processing pipelines.
